title: senecio triqueter
intro: Senecio triqueter, also known as Triquetrous Ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant to help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio triqueter include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of allergies, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Senecio triqueter can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
